problem id: c84c150e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11010110 -> 01001101
  01000001 -> 00010100
  01111101 -> 00010111
  10101000 -> 10001010
  00111011 -> 00100011
  11111111 -> 00000111
  01010010 -> 00100101
  10111100 -> 00001011
  00100011 -> 00100010

query: 00010001
predicted answer: 00010001
